creator: chuanwei.foo@hotmail.com
text:
`pkg install rubygem-mustache-sinatra` does not install devel/rubygem-mustache0 although devel/rubygem-mustache-sinatra depends on devel/rubygem-mustache0 at runtime. I am running FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE.

The absence of rubygem-mustache0 causes the following error when trying to run "gollum" (package: www/rubygem-gollum):


/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1458:in `rescue in block in activate_dependencies': Could not find 'mustache' (<= 0.99.8) among 49 total gem(s) (Gem::MissingSpecError)
Checked in 'GEM_PATH=/root/.local/share/gem/ruby/3.1:/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/3.1' at: /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/3.1/specifications/mustache-sinatra-1.0.1.gemspec, execute `gem env` for more information
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1455:in `block in activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1426:in `activate'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1462:in `block in activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1426:in `activate'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:284:in `block in activate_bin_path'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:283:in `synchronize'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:283:in `activate_bin_path'
        from /usr/local/bin/gollum:25:in `<main>'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/dependency.rb:314:in `to_specs': Could not find 'mustache' (<= 0.99.8) among 49 total gem(s) (Gem::MissingSpecError)
Checked in 'GEM_PATH=/root/.local/share/gem/ruby/3.1:/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/3.1' , execute `gem env` for more information
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1456:in `block in activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1426:in `activate'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1462:in `block in activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `each'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1444:in `activate_dependencies'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems/specification.rb:1426:in `activate'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:284:in `block in activate_bin_path'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:283:in `synchronize'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/3.1/rubygems.rb:283:in `activate_bin_path'
        from /usr/local/bin/gollum:25:in `<main>'
